negative_cases.why_wrong: Correlated Double Sampler: forces both outputs low instead of producing sampled correction and valid indication.
Correlated Double Sampler: continuously tracks vin and never forms the signal-minus-reset held correction.
Correlated Double Sampler: subtracts signal from reset, reversing the correlated-double-sampling correction.
Correlated Double Sampler: ignores the reset-phase sample and compares the signal only to the common-mode value.
Correlated Double Sampler: leaves valid asserted during reset-phase reacquisition.
